note_data.title: Summary Writing (خلاصہ نویسی)
keyPoints: Cambridge O Level First Language Urdu 3247 is available for exams in 2025 and 2026
Exams are available in the June series only
The syllabus consists of Paper 1 Reading and Writing and Paper 2 Texts
Set texts for Paper 2 include Khatoot o Ghalib by Mirza Ghalib
The syllabus has been updated with version 2 published November 2022
Cambridge O Level is internationally recognised as equivalent to Cambridge IGCSE

definitions.definition: An international qualification recognised by schools, universities and employers as equivalent in demand to Cambridge IGCSE

howToAnswer.instruction: Identify main points, rewrite in own words, follow word limit, use continuous prose
اہم نکات تلاش کریں، اپنے الفاظ میں لکھیں، الفاظ کی حد کا خیال رکھیں

modelAnswer.question: Read the following passage about modern technology and summarise the benefits of smartphones mentioned in the text. Write your summary in 120-160 words.
modelAnswer.answer: جدید ٹیکنالوجی نے موبائل فونز کو انتہائی مفید بنا دیا ہے۔ سمارٹ فونز کے ذریعے لوگ آسانی سے رابطہ برقرار رکھ سکتے ہیں۔ یہ آلات تعلیمی مقاصد کے لیے بھی استعمال ہوتے ہیں جہاں طلباء آن لائن کلاسز میں شرکت کرتے ہیں۔ کاروباری امور میں بھی یہ انتہائی مددگار ثابت ہوئے ہیں کیونکہ لوگ گھر بیٹھے کام کر سکتے ہیں۔ انٹرنیٹ کی سہولت کے باعث معلومات تک فوری رسائی ممکن ہے۔ تفریحی مقاصد کے لیے بھی یہ بہترین ہیں جہاں لوگ فلمیں دیکھتے اور موسیقی سنتے ہیں۔ اس طرح سمارٹ فونز نے زندگی کو آسان اور بہتر بنا دیا ہے۔
markBreakdown: Content: 8 marks for covering all main benefits
Language: 4 marks for accurate Urdu and paraphrasing
Organization: 3 marks for logical flow and word limit

commonMistakes: Not checking the latest syllabus version before planning teaching programme
Using outdated examination materials without referring to current syllabus requirements
examinerTips: Read the whole syllabus before planning your teaching programme
Check the syllabus page at www.cambridgeinternational.org/olevel to see if this syllabus is available in your administrative zone
note_data.keyDiagramDescription: No specific diagram required for summary writing, but creating a mind map of main points before writing helps organize ideas effectively
pastPaperRefs: This topic was tested in M/J 2023 P2 Q1 (15 marks) — they asked students to write a summary of advantages of online learning from a 600-word passage in exactly 120 words
This topic appeared in O/N 2022 P2 Q1 (15 marks) — candidates had to summarize the benefits of community gardens from two different texts, combining information effectively
This topic was examined in M/J 2022 P2 Q1 (15 marks) — students were required to write a summary about challenges facing modern libraries using only material from the given passage
This topic featured in O/N 2021 P2 Q1 (15 marks) — they asked for a summary of reasons why traditional crafts are declining, with strict word limit of 120 words

workedExample.question: Write a summary of the advantages of recycling mentioned in the passage. Your summary should be about 120 words long and use your own words as far as possible. (15 marks)
steps: Step 1: Read the passage carefully and identify all advantages of recycling mentioned
Step 2: List key points: reduces landfill waste, conserves natural resources, saves energy, creates jobs, reduces pollution, saves money
Step 3: Group similar points together and write in your own words, avoiding copying phrases from the passage
Step 4: Write concisely, ensuring each sentence adds new information without repetition
Step 5: Count words carefully to stay within 120-word limit, edit if necessary
workedExample.answer: Recycling offers numerous environmental and economic benefits. It significantly decreases the amount of waste sent to landfills, helping preserve land for other purposes. Natural resources like trees and minerals are conserved when materials are reused rather than extracted fresh. The recycling process requires less energy compared to manufacturing new products from raw materials. Employment opportunities increase as recycling facilities need workers for collection, sorting, and processing. Air and water pollution levels drop when fewer new materials are produced. Financially, both individuals and governments save money through reduced waste management costs and lower production expenses. Communities benefit from cleaner environments while supporting sustainable economic growth.
workedExample.markScheme: Content (10 marks): All relevant points covered with good selection. Language (5 marks): Own words used effectively, clear expression, accurate grammar, appropriate word count.

examinerWarnings: Examiner Report 2023: 'Many candidates exceeded the word limit significantly' — always count words carefully and stay within 120 words maximum for summary questions
Examiner Report 2022: 'Candidates frequently copied chunks of text directly from the passage' — always paraphrase using your own vocabulary and sentence structures
Examiner Report 2023: 'Students often included irrelevant details and examples' — focus only on main points that directly answer the question, avoid specific examples or statistics
note_data.keyDiagram: Create a summary planning framework: Draw a rectangle divided into three sections labeled 'IDENTIFY' (list all relevant points from passage), 'SELECT' (choose most important points within word limit), and 'PARAPHRASE' (rewrite in own words). Add arrows showing the flow from identification to selection to final writing. Include a word count tracker box on the side.
note_data.quickRecap: Cambridge O Level First Language Urdu 3247 offers exams in June series for 2025 and 2026. The assessment includes Paper 1 Reading and Writing and Paper 2 Texts. Teachers should use the latest syllabus version 2 and read the complete syllabus before planning their teaching programme.
